intake.risk_posture: Moderate product QA with bounded root-fix slices and focused characterization.
intake.harness_policy: Goal docs, focused tests, and current generated public-v3 tag fixes are allowed; no dependency, remote, lint-rule, or AGENTS changes without explicit approval.
protected_areas: unrelated Builder/Collection behavior except shared stat/sort consumers
validation_commands: focused npx vitest run commands per slice
npm run verify for broad checkpoints
intake.stop_condition: Stop when all seven QA issues are terminal, a product/design decision is required, verification fails twice for the same slice, or scope expands beyond the QA list.

focus_areas.name: Issue 1: 24 Rouse overlay scaling
focus_areas.evidence: Scout found the Rouse skill and Realm/Persona overlay both have scaling ladders, but overlay popover references drop descriptionRank.
focus_areas.next: Implemented by W1: rank context now follows scaled overlay opens from rich descriptions.

focus_areas.name: Issue 2: main/sub substat filtering
focus_areas.evidence: Scout found main/sub can be inferred from stat-specific high/low substatScaling magnitudes.
focus_areas.next: Implemented by W1: Any/Main/Sub scaling role filter is URL-backed and low-bloat.

focus_areas.name: Issue 3: posse/covenant card max size
focus_areas.evidence: Scout found square-art grid auto-fit/minmax(...,1fr) stretches filtered cards.
focus_areas.next: Implemented by W1: square-art tracks cap at about 145px.

focus_areas.name: Issue 4: Gnostic stats in browse/sort
focus_areas.evidence: Scout found detail applies defaultMaxed Gnostic from full records while browse/sort uses lite catalog stats.
focus_areas.next: Implemented by W1: lite catalog carries defaultPrimaryStatBonuses and browse/sort/card stats use them.

focus_areas.name: Issue 5: Awakener detail tabs
focus_areas.evidence: Scout found Overview is the default/pathless tab, Builds is visible, and lore/story content lives in Overview.
focus_areas.next: Implemented by W1: Upgrades is default, Lore is last, Overview/Builds are route-compatible but hidden.

focus_areas.name: Issue 6: upcoming banner end dates
focus_areas.evidence: Scout found end dates are only in native title text and hover target is broad wrapper/drawer space.
focus_areas.next: Implemented by W1: upcoming long-range banners show end dates and titles sit on date text only.

focus_areas.name: Issue 7: persisted database sorting
focus_areas.evidence: Scout found browse sort state only writes URL params while safe storage helpers already exist.
focus_areas.next: Implemented by W1: awakener and wheel sort preferences persist in safe local storage with URL override.

focus_areas.name: Current public-v3 tag fixes
focus_areas.evidence: Dirty tree contains coherent tag fixes for Castor, Arachne, Saya and regenerated public-v3 indexes/catalogs.
focus_areas.next: W0 validated the tag/index changes and goal packet.

candidates.title: Checkpoint current public-v3 tag fixes
candidates.evidence: Dirty tree adds Corrosion/Self-Damage/Discard/Divine Realm tags and regenerated indexes.
candidates.next: Implemented by W0; no further action unless generated data drifts again.

candidates.title: Preserve originating skill rank when opening scaled overlay references
candidates.evidence: Realm/Persona overlay defaults to rank 1 because descriptionRank is undefined after popover hydration.
candidates.next: Contextual rank propagation through rich-description overlay popovers. Verified in W1.

candidates.title: Add main/sub scaling filter role
candidates.evidence: High/low stat-specific substatScaling values infer MAIN/SUB without duplicating filter chips.
candidates.next: Scaling role inference plus Any/Main/Sub filter state and UI. Verified in W1.

candidates.title: Cap square-art posse/covenant grid tracks
candidates.evidence: Square-art layout uses auto-fit with 1fr max track.
candidates.next: Square-art posse/covenant grid max track cap. Verified in W1.

candidates.title: Include default-maxed Gnostic bonuses in lite browse/sort stats
concept_blast_radius: public-v3 catalog generation or generated catalog records
candidates.evidence: Detail path applies defaultMaxed Gnostic; browse path only sees catalog base stats.
candidates.next: Default-maxed Gnostic catalog bonuses applied in lite/browse/sort stats. Verified in W1.

candidates.title: Hide Overview/Builds, add Lore last, default Upgrades
candidates.evidence: Overview is current default and owns lore; Builds tab is visible but empty.
candidates.next: Awakener detail visible tab model, Lore tab, and Upgrades default. Verified in W1.

candidates.title: Show upcoming banner end date and tighten hover target
candidates.evidence: Upcoming long-range banners show start only and use broad native title targets.
candidates.next: Visible upcoming banner date ranges and narrowed native title targets. Verified in W1.

candidates.title: Persist awakener and wheel sort preferences
candidates.evidence: Sort controls update URL only; existing safe storage abstractions can support deterministic preferences.
candidates.next: Local sort preference persistence for awakeners and wheels. Verified in W1.

maintenance.title: Atlas/spritesheet for tiny assets
maintenance.reason: User agreed atlas/spritesheet is an issue for another day.

maintenance.title: Generated tag-fix workflow drift
maintenance.trigger: dirty generated data arrived during QA pass
maintenance.reason: No repeated generated-data mismatch was found during W1 validation; future tooling workflow changes need a fresh concrete mismatch or separate user scope.

tasks.title: Map all seven QA issues and dirty public-v3 tag fixes
tasks.expected_output: Evidence-backed candidates for every QA issue with blast radius and validation.

receipt.summary: Six read-only scout agents mapped the seven QA issues and current dirty generated tag fixes.
evidence: Issue 1: data ladders exist; popover overlay rank context is dropped.
Issues 2 and 4: main/sub role is inferable; browse stats miss defaultMaxed Gnostic because lite catalog lacks bonuses.
Issues 3 and 7: square-art grid stretches via 1fr; sort state is URL-only despite safe storage helpers.
Issue 5: overview/builds routing and tab rendering need a visible/enabled tab model, Lore last, Upgrades default.
Issue 6: upcoming end date is hidden in title and title is on broad targets.
Cross-cutting: dirty public-v3 tag fixes are coherent and should be checkpointed.

tasks.title: Validate and checkpoint current public-v3 tag fixes
protected_files: product code outside docs for W0
tasks.expected_output: Current generated tag fixes are validated and either committed as a checkpoint or recorded as safe to carry into the first code slice.

receipt.summary: Validated the current public-v3 tag fixes and created the QA goal packet.
evidence: Castor gained Corrosion, Arachne gained Self-Damage, and Saya gained Discard/Corrosion/Divine Realm/Self-Damage search tags.
Regenerated awakener catalog, facets, search-awakeners, search-tags, and manifest are part of the same dirty-tree concept.
validation: npx vitest run src/domain/public-search.test.ts src/domain/awakeners.test.ts src/features/database/internal/useDatabaseViewModel.test.ts --pool=forks --maxWorkers=4 -> 3 files, 30 tests passed

tasks.title: Parallel implementation tranche for the seven QA fixes
allowed_files: C1 overlay rank propagation files and focused tests
C2/C7 database browse state/filter/sort preference files and focused tests
C3 database square-art CSS/files and visual checks
C4 generated catalog/stat resolver/sort/card files and focused tests
C5 awakener tab route/modal/lore files and focused tests
C6 timeline countdown/card/drawer files and focused tests
protected_files: unrelated Builder/Collection behavior except shared stat/sort consumers
tasks.expected_output: Independent worker patches for the seven QA candidates, each with changed files and validation notes for controller review.

receipt.summary: Implemented and integrated all seven QA fixes after parallel worker slices, with controller cleanup for lint, generated catalog diff size, and final verification.
evidence: C1: RichDescription passes descriptionRank/descriptionMaxRank into root overlay opens; popover model preserves it through fallback, hydration, and live refresh while generic opens remain rankless.
C2: substat scaling filters now support Any/Main/Sub using stat-specific high/low scaling inference, with active chips and URL state.
C3: square-art database card grid uses a capped max track of 9.0625rem so filtered posse/covenant cards remain about 145px.

C4: public-v3 awakener catalog includes defaultPrimaryStatBonuses for 29 default-maxed Gnostic awakeners; lite stat resolvers, sorting, and grid cards consume those bonuses without loading full talent records.
C5: Awakener details default to Upgrades, hide Overview/Builds from visible tabs, keep disabled routes canonical to Upgrades, and move story content into Lore as the last tab.
C6: Upcoming long-range banners display date ranges such as Starts Jun 15 - Jul 13, with native titles only on visible date text and drawer date text added.
C7: Awakener and wheel sort preferences persist via database-browse-preferences local storage, with explicit URL sort params taking precedence.
validation: npm exec vitest run focused 18-file matrix -> 18 files, 172 tests passed
npm run format:changed -> 45 files unchanged after formatting
npm run test:bounded -> 205 files, 1344 tests passed
npm run test:scripts -> 4 script tests passed
npm run build -> passed, with existing Vite chunk-size/plugin-timing warnings only

Browser spot check on 127.0.0.1:5179: posse filtered card stayed 145px on desktop and 390px mobile; Saya detail tablist showed Upgrades/Skills/Teams/Lore with Upgrades selected; main scaling filter showed active DMG Amp and Scaling: Main chips; timeline upcoming banners showed Starts Jun 15 - Jul 13.
risks: Future public-v3 regeneration should preserve or emit defaultPrimaryStatBonuses for default-maxed Gnostic awakeners.
Main/Sub inference intentionally follows current stat-specific high/low scaling values; future new tiers should update the helper constants and tests.

final_audit.summary: All seven user-named Saya QA issues are implemented and verified locally; current public-v3 tag fixes remain included from W0.
validation: npm exec vitest run focused 18-file matrix -> 18 files, 172 tests passed

npm run test:scripts -> 4 script tests passed
